expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Alright, I have read through everything you sent and I can see why this feels scattered. Here is what you have across those six pieces:"]},{"type":"List","props":{"items":["Your trip planning notes with the full itinerary, Richard the safari contact, packing lists, and day-by-day plans for you and Athina Mari.","A cost spreadsheet with flights, park fees, and accommodation broken out — your budget in one place.","The official Ngorongoro Conservation Area tariff PDF with the actual park-fee figures.","A beautiful photo of a sunlit Stone Town courtyard with white stucco and carved balconies — classic Zanzibar.","Your voice memo from the crater with three live facts not written down anywhere: Emmanuel (your driver-guide, not Richard), the Maasai bracelets you bought for Athina Mari (~$20-25 or TZS 35,000), and that ranger tip at the gate (~TZS 5,000) that nobody mentioned — and that you want to ask Richard about before the safari balance payment."]},"children":[]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["That is your itinerary, your money, your official docs, a personal photo, and on-the-ground details — all in different formats, nothing you can open on your phone when you are standing at a gate trying to remember whether that tip was included."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Want me to pull all of this into one place you can actually open and check?"]}," I would build you an app right here in this project — your itinerary, your costs with the real figures from the spreadsheet and the PDF, the contacts (Richard, Emmanuel), a place for the bracelet purchase and that ranger-tip question, and your Stone Town photo. One tap, everything you need, no digging through files."]}]}
